sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_uuids (id UInt32, byte_data FixedString(16));
SELECT reinterpretAsUUID(byte_data) AS uuid, id FROM test_uuids WHERE byte_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsUUID(reverse(unhex(concat(hex(byte_data), '0000')))) AS padded_uuid FROM test_uuids;
WITH (SELECT id || '-' || hex(byte_data) AS combined FROM test_uuids) AS subquery SELECT reinterpretAsUUID(reverse(unhex(combined))) AS uuid FROM subquery;
CREATE TABLE test_join (parent_id UInt32, child_data UInt32);

SELECT t1.parent_id, reinterpretAsUUID(reverse(unhex(concat('00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff', toHex(t1.child_data))))) AS combined_uuid FROM test_join AS t1 JOIN test_uuids AS t2 ON t1.parent_id = t2.id;
WITH (SELECT reinterpretAsUUID(byte_data) AS uid FROM test_uuids WHERE id < 3) AS temp_uid SELECT COUNT(*) AS uid_count FROM temp_uid WHERE uid IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT MAX(id) AS max_id, MIN(id) AS min_id FROM test_uuids) AS bounds SELECT reinterpretAsUUID(concat(unhex(min_id), toString(max_id))) AS boundary_uuid FROM bounds;
CREATE TABLE test_nullable (id UInt32, nullable_data Nullable(FixedString(16)));
SELECT reinterpretAsUUID(nullable_data) AS uid FROM test_nullable WHERE nullable_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsUUID(concat(coalesce(nullable_data, unhex('00000000000000000000000000000000')))) AS fallback_uuid FROM test_nullable;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT arrayJoin(array(1, 2, 3)) AS num;
SELECT reinterpretAsUUID(hex(concat('ffffff', toFixedString(num, 16)))) AS complex_uuid FROM temp_table;
